hypotheses.name: Regional Platform Degradation May Impact Primary Customer
hypotheses.statement: Region '{region}' shows SLI degradation across {impacted_subscriptions} subscriptions for SLI '{slo_sli_id}'. Other customers are already experiencing breaches — the primary customer's resources in this region are at risk of impact spill-over.
hypotheses.supporting_signals: Strongest when SYM-SLI-007 (multi-SLI regional degradation across customers) co-occurs with SYM-SLI-001 (primary customer already showing impact in the same region). SYM-SLI-006 alone is a leading warning; combined with SYM-SLI-001 it confirms spill-over is actively happening. Without SYM-SLI-001, this hypothesis serves as a proactive alert — the primary customer is not yet impacted but the risk is elevated.
